sprint: Sprint 1: Session Lifecycle + OOB Auth Fix

tasks.title: Validate PID-capture shell wrapper on Unix and Windows
tasks.notes: pidWrapUnix/pidWrapWindows helpers + unit tests in tests/unit/pid-wrapper.test.ts. Committed c35aa77.

tasks.title: Add killPid to OsCommands interface + implementations
tasks.notes: killPid(pid) added to OsCommands interface, LinuxCommands (kill -9), WindowsCommands (taskkill /F /T). MacOSCommands inherits from Linux. activePid added to Agent type. getStoredPid/setStoredPid/clearStoredPid in agent-helpers.ts. All tests pass.

tasks.title: Wrap provider commands with PID-announcing shell wrapper
tasks.notes: buildAgentPromptCommand in linux.ts and windows.ts already call pidWrapUnix/pidWrapWindows (done in T1). Added FLEET_PID assertions to platform.test.ts to formally close T3.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 1 — PID Capture Foundation
tasks.notes: npm run build: clean. npm test: 52 test files, 889 passed, 7 skipped (platform-conditional), 0 failures. pidWrapUnix/pidWrapWindows verified on Windows (string tests always run, execution tests run on host platform). killPid commands correct. Agent.activePid compiles. PID store helpers tested. buildAgentPromptCommand output contains FLEET_PID wrapper for all providers.

tasks.title: Stream stdout in execCommand and parse PID line
tasks.notes: extractAndStorePid() in strategy.ts post-processes SSHExecResult from both RemoteStrategy and LocalStrategy. Scans stdout for FLEET_PID:<pid> line, calls setStoredPid, strips the line. 7 unit tests in tests/unit/pid-extraction.test.ts. Build clean, 899 tests pass.

tasks.title: Kill stored PID before retries and at start of new executePrompt
Implement rolling inactivity timer in stream watchdog
Update execute_prompt schema description and pass max_total_ms
Add stop_agent tool to fleet-mcp server
Skip GUI terminal on headless, show actionable instructions
Integration test — inactivity timeout + cancellation + OOB fallback
